description: A critical automated pipeline failure caused the system to miss the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake. Manually recover the event in SeisComP (scolv) by creating and committing a new origin using the parameters provided in '~/Desktop/usgs_alert.txt' (Time: 2024-01-01 07:10:09.5 UTC, Lat: 37.498, Lon: 137.242, Depth: 10 km). Compute and commit the magnitudes using archived waveform data from the GE network. Export the complete event data, including the new origin and magnitude, to '~/recovered_event.xml'.
